name: trustscoreagent
description: Check the reputation of AI microservices and public APIs from an open trust registry.
long_description: TrustScoreAgent is a free, open reputation registry for AI microservices. This MCP server lets an agent check whether an external service is trustworthy *before* calling it, and contribute a rating afterward. It exposes three tools — check_reputation, submit_rating, and list_services — backed by the public API at https://api.trustscoreagent.com (no account or key required). Scores come from Bayesian reputation math plus EigenTrust, and can be strengthened by cryptographic service receipts.

tools.name: check_reputation
tools.description: Check the trust score of an AI microservice before calling it (score, confidence, and availability/latency/conformity breakdown).

tools.name: submit_rating
tools.description: Rate an AI microservice after calling it, from your interaction metrics and an optional service receipt.

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: Discover rated services sorted by trust score, with score and rating-count filters.

trustscore_api_url.title: TrustScoreAgent API URL
trustscore_api_url.description: Base URL of the TrustScoreAgent API. Leave as-is to use the public production API.

trustscore_agent_did.title: Agent DID (optional)
trustscore_agent_did.description: Stable identifier for this agent. Leave empty to auto-generate one on first run.
